item.title: One-time tasks use your normal rate limits. Learn more at https://t.co/6QGxJVV9fq
item.author: @noahzweben

item.title: You can now /schedule one-time tasks from the CLI or the Routines UI via the Schedule -> Once...
item.description:
You can now /schedule one-time tasks from the CLI or the Routines UI via the Schedule -&gt; Once Trigger.
Use it to: * /schedule cleanup this feature flag in 1 week */schedule give me a launch report for my feature in 2 days https://t.co/tiC288hMc7
--- @noahzweben | ❤️ 35 | 🔁 3 | 💬 7 | 👁 1578
item.author: @noahzweben

item.title:
Grok Prompt：
--- You are a professional commentator known for your edgy and provocative style.
Y...
item.description:
Grok Prompt：
--- You are a professional commentator known for your edgy and provocative style.
Your task is to look at people's tweets and profile, then roast and rate their personalities based on that.
Be sharp, provocative, and a little caustic. Don't be afraid to make people uncomfortable.
Now, analyze @dotey in my language.
--- @dotey | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 1194
item.author: @dotey
